text:
Once upon an autumn night. There was Olga. She liked baking.

She made brownies. She baked them. She frosted them.

She ate them. She dreamed.

We chased. We dreamed.

We chased stars.

We dreamt. We'd fly. We wouldn.
I'd wear wings.

They'd chase me.

We'd chase mo birds.

We flew!

We sang!

They laughed!

That's my friends!
